trail.val: annualized run-rate >$25bn as of Mar-2026 (vs ~$20bn Nov-2025)

forward.note: Plan repeatedly revised up; FY25 ~9% ahead, 2029 raised 27%; whole AI capex cycle a leveraged bet on these numbers hitting.

trail.val: ~$650bn signed compute obligations over decade (OCI ~$300bn, Azure ~$250bn); ~30GW power over 5yrs; >$600bn partner-borne capex
cumulative compute opex peaking ~$110bn 2028, rising to ~$180bn 2029 in revised plan
Nvidia+AMD+Broadcom commitments well in excess of $1T over ~4-5yrs, 50-60% accruing to compute partners

forward.note: Compute, not demand, is the binding constraint (Friar 'constantly under compute').

trail.val: Broadcom OpenAI XPU tapes out late-2026, ships 2H27, bigger 2028; ~20 GW Anthropic+OpenAI SPV; lower visibility than Anthropic
NVIDIA ≥10 GW (NVDA invests up to $100B, first 1 GW Vera Rubin 2H26); AMD 6 GW; Broadcom 10 GW (2H26-2029); AWS +~2 GW Trainium ~$100B+ from 2027; Cerebras 750 MW

forward.note: First ~1 GW on Vera Rubin + AMD MI450 expected 2H26; one of two anchor gigawatt-class ASIC customers w/ Anthropic.

trail.val: The Information est. ~$46bn cash burn over four years (JPM)
latest plan implies $111bn more cash burn through 2030

forward.note: Profitability not expected until ~2029 even on the bull plan.

trail.val: path to 2.75B WAU by 2030; ~50m net-WAU-adds/month cadence

forward.note: Scale leader but ChatGPT fell below 50% AI market share for first time; payer-conversion dependency a watch-item.
